examples: A glance through his office window offers a panoramic view of the Washington Monument and the Lincoln Memorial.
The terrain's high points provide a panoramic view of Los Angeles.
After climbing up a hill for a panoramic view of the blue sea, white buildings and green olive trees, I paused to catch my breath and then positioned myself to take the best photo of this panorama.
See and be seen at the rooftop infinity pool and bar for the panoramic views.
However you make it to the summit, revel in the panoramic views across the verdant Surrey countryside.
